name: SSH Lateral Movement
description: Detects SSH connections between internal systems
query:
// SSH Lateral Movement
// Internal SSH connections between servers
events from authentication
where event_type = "authentication_success" and service = "ssh"
  and (source_ip starts_with "10." or source_ip starts_with "192.168." or source_ip starts_with "172.")
group by source_ip, destination_ip, username
having count(*) > 3
within 300 seconds
